levels.name: Cathedral Level 1
intro_texts: You descend into the cathedral crypts. The air reeks of rot and sulfur. Three passages stretch before you into darkness.
Ancient stone groans beneath your boots as the catacombs swallow you whole. Torches flicker in a distant draft. Three corridors await your choice.
The dead do not rest here. You feel their hunger as you step into the gloom. Three paths diverge before you.
Shadows cling to the cathedral walls like old sin. Something skitters in the darkness ahead. Three passages beckon.
The weight of the earth presses down as you enter. The smell of death is overwhelming. Choose your path carefully.

visible.Zombie: A shambling undead corpse blocks the path ahead.
visible.Ghoul: A hunched ghoul prowls the corridor, seeking flesh.
visible.Fallen One (spear): A frenzied Fallen One brandishes a rusted spear.
visible.Fallen One (sword): A Fallen One clutches a chipped sword, shrieking curses.
visible.Skeleton: An animated skeleton guards the passage with hollow eyes.
visible.Scavenger: A four-legged carrion beast crouches in the darkness ahead.
visible.chest: An old chest sits against the wall, its lock rusted with age.
visible.level: Stairs descend deeper into the cathedral's bowels.

levels.name: Cathedral Level 2
intro_texts: The second level of the cathedral swallows you whole. The air is colder here — and older. Something watches from the dark.
Stone stairs groan beneath your boots as you descend. The torchlight barely reaches the walls. Whatever lives here has not seen the sun in centuries.
Deeper now. The stench of rot is overwhelming. The dead here have had far longer to fester.
The cathedral's second vaults stretch before you, their geometry wrong in ways you cannot name. Press on.
You descend into older darkness. The scratching sounds from the walls are closer here. More deliberate.

visible.Rotting Carcass: A bloated undead horror lurches through the corridor, trailing decay.
visible.Corpse Axe: A skeletal warrior raises its rusted axe as you approach.
visible.Devil Kin: A seasoned fallen warrior watches you with calculating red eyes.
visible.Vile Hunter: A lithe demon weaves between shadows, waiting to strike.
visible.Ghoul: A hunched ghoul sniffs the air and fixes its gaze on you.
visible.Dark One: The largest of the fallen demons blocks your path, silent and menacing.
visible.Black Death: An enormous undead monstrosity fills the corridor. The air reeks of plague.
visible.Burning Dead: A skeleton wreathed in hellfire charges toward you, screeching.
visible.The Butcher: AHHH... fresh meat! A massive demon butcher fills the room. His cleaver is already raised.
visible.chest: A weathered chest rests in the corner, undisturbed for years.
visible.level: Stairs descend to the third level of the cathedral.
